response.justification: Bogdan is a capable senior/staff engineer with roughly 20 years of broad software experience, recent exposure to AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks, and genuine entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor with recognized, deep AI strategy expertise, demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers, and cloud platform leadership at scale. Bogdan's AI involvement is recent and infrastructure-tooling-oriented rather than strategic or thought-leadership-level, and there is no evidence of the executive advisory, partner engagement, or externally recognized AI expertise the role requires. The educational gap (no advanced AI degree) and absence of cloud architecture credentials further widen the distance from the preferred profile.
strengths: ~20 years of polyglot software experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, demonstrating genuine engineering breadth
Active hands-on contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role, showing willingness to engage with the AI space
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and history of community teaching (workshops, talks, Dojos), indicating initiative and knowledge-sharing instincts
concerns: AI expertise is recent, narrow, and tooling-level; no demonstrated AI strategy, ML platform ownership, or externally recognized AI thought leadership
No evidence of director-level IC scope: advising strategic enterprise customers, influencing product roadmaps at scale, or partnering with C-suite stakeholders
Cloud depth appears minimal — no cloud architecture certifications, large-scale cloud platform design, or infrastructure strategy work cited
